text: Tornadoes touch down in Rochester area - MPR News
fullText: Severe thunderstorms produced tornadoes Friday afternoon in southeast Minnesota. The National Weather Service reported a damaging tornado in the Marion area southeast of Rochester just before 3 p.m. and another tornado near Plainview.

text: Markets News, April 17, 2026: Indexes Close Higher for 3rd Straight Week - Investopedia
fullText: Major stock indexes ended sharply higher for a third straight week and oil prices plummeted after Iran's foreign minister said that the important Strait of Hormuz shipping channel was "declared completely open" for the duration of the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire.

text: Live Updates: Trump says U.S. will continue blockade after Iran says Strait of Hormuz "completely open" - CBS News
fullText: President Trump has welcomed Iran's announcement that, at least while the Israel-Lebanon ceasefire holds, the Strait of Hormuz is "completely open" to all ships.

text: Northern Lights Could Shine Over Unlikely U.S. Locations Tonight and Tomorrow as Rare Geomagnetic Storm Sparks Spectacular Aurora Display - The Daily Galaxy
